shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The overlay keeps a 16x16px dot module for every predicted route segment.
differences: Dots use ice blue and cream pixels so board tiles stay visible beneath them.
Four variants cover upward, horizontal, turn, and impact states.
Impact markers add alert orange corners for the final collision cell.

context.usage: Preview dots and impact markers for hazard routes.

specs.texture: Open-center dots with a distinct impact glyph.
specs.shading: Flat translucent look simulated through sparse fill.

acceptance_criteria: Overlay sheet size is exactly 64x16px with 4 directional cells of 16x16px.
Each dot variant keeps enough transparent area for the board to remain legible.
The impact glyph is distinguishable from the turn glyph within one cell.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas-driven overlay sprites spawned per predicted cell.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/art_000005.png and keep a small overlay atlas resource.
runtime_notes: Recycle marker entities instead of despawning them on every hover.
Keep impact markers on a higher z layer than route dots.
